name: MSSP - OS - MS - 29 - H - Windows Audit Log Cleared
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event matches Event ID is any of 1102
when at least 1 events are seen with the same Username in 10 minutes
thresholds: when at least 1 events are seen with the same Username in 10 minutes
TD_list: APPLY MSSP - OS - MS - 29 - H - Windows Audit Log Cleared on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event matches Event ID is any of 1102
AND when at least 1 events are seen with the same Username in 10 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Windows Audit Log Cleared
